_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. The exhaustive per-content history lives in scripts/content-backlog.json (one detailed entry per shipped module); this file keeps only the current snapshot plus the balance method.

observed.note: NEW-BOSS-MECHANIC-5 (2026-07-16): added 'The Pyre Headsman' (red grade 'H'), the FIFTH apex boss mechanic — EXECUTE — and extended the apex rotation size%4 -> size%5 (T/W/S/M/H, all red, realms >=5). Execute is the deliberate MIRROR of the very first mechanic (enrage): enrage keys the boss's offense ramp to the BOSS's own dwindling HP (scarier as IT dies); execute keys the same ramp to the HERO's HP (scarier as the HERO dies). New helper lj.enemy.executes(enemy,currentHp,maxHp) returns a boosted attack snapshot (str+agi x damageMult, same shape as enraged, zero-alloc no-op on the common path) once the hero is below threshold*maxHp; js/combat.js chains it onto the boss's swing as executes(enraged(enemy,...),heroHealth,heroMaxHealth) — a boss carries one mechanic so the inapplicable helper is a strict no-op (the enrage snapshot lacks .mechanic, so execute passes it through). heroMaxHealth=100+heroStats.hp*5 (the game's real max formula). Like sunder it fires ONLY on the boss's own swing, so the hero still dies only on the boss's turn and the shared outcome.actor health-check needs no killing-blow special-case; it never adds boss HP nor eats hero blows, so fights stay SHORT — it just ends a losing fight faster, punishing the razor-thin boss-attrition near-miss (half of all boss deaths already land with the hero low). Wired: types.red.H, isBoss('H'), bossGradeForRealm size%5 default->H, hero.js creaturesAndItemsMap.H, scene.js spriteMap.H=[0,9] (reuses the boss sprite B/T/W/S/M already use — zero new render risk); realm.js places it via the existing generic bossGradeForRealm path, harness auto-fights bossGradeForRealm. A '.executed' log flag (parallel to '.enraged') is set for future telegraphs; nothing reads it yet. BALANCE — clean fifth SIBLING by the established method: reuses the Warden/Colossus/Reaver defensive block [5,7,82,1,3,5,2] EXACTLY (armor/defense untouched per the depth-philosophy; the mechanic carries the threat), with threshold + damageMult as the two knobs. A 5-combo isolated sweep (all deep = Headsman, 8k runs each) landed (threshold 0.55, damageMult 2.0) at 38.95%, confirmed at 12k = 38.88% — a dead-on PEER with the siblings (Cinderwyrm 38.9 / Warden 38.5 / Colossus 38.2 / Reaver 38.97; an all-Reaver control on this same post-affix-batch-4 codebase read 38.35). LOAD-BEARING: isolated OFF (mechanic disabled, plain block) 45.24% -> ON 38.88% = -6.36pt (~10 sigma), matching the siblings' 6-7pt swings. An easy first draft (0.35, 1.6) read 42.5% isolated (only -2.8pt, ~4pt too soft) — firing only below 35% HP barely bit because the hero was usually dead by then; widening to the bottom HALF of the bar (0.55) and doubling the boosted blows (2.0 = the kill move) made the back half genuinely lethal. SHIPPED (real size%5 rotation, deep runs meet every apex): isolated-tree 12k 36.65% / live-checkout 12k 37.43% (pooled ~37.0%) — NEUTRAL vs the pre-Headsman baseline 37.15% (clean origin/main, 10k), within noise. Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` read 36.9% (2215/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms: halls 400, frost 1600, blight 3600, ember 20800). JS-all 28.48KB brotli (<=55KB). Headless browser-verified on dist/: rotation 5-14 = T,W,S,M,H,T,W,S,M,H, isBoss('H'), an 'H' boss tile is placed+generated crash-free on a realm-5 board, 300 in-browser Headsman fights fire execute with 0 console errors. The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base (js/enemy.js) remains the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
